ionic.full: H⁺ + Cl⁻ + Na⁺ + OH⁻ → Na⁺ + Cl⁻ + H₂O
Ag⁺ + NO₃⁻ + Na⁺ + Cl⁻ → AgCl↓ + Na⁺ + NO₃⁻
Na⁺ + HCO₃⁻ + H⁺ + Cl⁻ → Na⁺ + Cl⁻ + H₂O + CO₂↑
NH₄⁺ + Cl⁻ + Na⁺ + OH⁻ → Na⁺ + Cl⁻ + NH₃↑ + H₂O
CH₃COOH + Na⁺ + OH⁻ → Na⁺ + CH₃COO⁻ + H₂O
Fe(s) + Cu²⁺ + SO₄²⁻ → Fe²⁺ + SO₄²⁻ + Cu(s)
Zn(s) + Cu²⁺ + SO₄²⁻ → Zn²⁺ + SO₄²⁻ + Cu(s)

oxidizer.note: Mn also goes to +6 in K₂MnO₄ (disproportionation)

reducer.note: partial — O in NO₃⁻ also forms O₂

oxidizer.note: H from water in NaOH solution
